name: Churchill Capital Corp III
description: Churchill Capital Corp III was a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. In October 2020, the company completed its business combination with MultiPlan, Inc., a leading value-driven provider of data analytics and technology-enabled end-to-end cost management solutions to the U.S. healthcare industry, with the combined company continuing to trade on the NYSE.
